basic_details.job_title: DCHS Tirupati Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 10 Plumber, Theatre Assistant and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: District Coordinator of Hospital Services Tirupati (DCHS Tirupati)
basic_details.short_information: District Coordinator of Hospital Services Tirupati (DCHS Tirupati) has released an official notification for the recruitment of 10 Paramedical and Supporting Staff Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply Offline by sending the application form to the official address. The last date to submit the application is 06-07-2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 42 years Age Relaxation: SC/ST/BC/EWS: 5 years; Ex-servicemen: 3 years + service; PWD: 10 years; Max with all relaxations: 52 years

qualification.education_qualification: SSC/10th or equivalent, ITI Plumbing/Fitter/Mechanic trade
qualification.details: Theatre Assistant: Must have passed SSC/10th or its equivalent. Record Assistant/MRA: Must have passed SSC/10th or its equivalent. Plumber: Must have passed SSC or its equivalent exam from a recognized board and Passed ITI plumbing trade/ITI Fitter trade/ITI mechanic trade from a recognized institution. GDA/MNO/FNO: Must have passed SSC/10th class or its equivalent from a recognized Board. Post Mortem Assistant: Must have passed SSC/10th class or its equivalent from a recognized Board.

salary_details.details: Theatre Assistant: Rs. 15000/- Per Month Record Assistant/MRA: Rs. 15000/- Per Month Plumber: Rs. 18500/- Per Month GDA/MNO/FNO: Rs. 15000/- Per Month Post Mortem Assistant: Rs. 15000/- Per Month

selection_process: Aggregate marks in qualifying examination (75%) Service weightage Counseling on merit basis following roster points
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DCHS Tirupati Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://tirupati.ap.gov.in/.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 06-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download DCHS Tirupati Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download DCHS Tirupati Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DCHS Tirupati recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the DCHS Tirupati Paramedical and Supporting Staff posts is 06-07-2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Paramedical and Supporting Staff?
faq.answer: There are a total of 10 vacancies for Paramedical and Supporting Staff posts released by DCHS Tirupati.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum and maximum age limit for the posts?
faq.answer: The minimum age limit is 18 years and the maximum age limit is 42 years for all the posts.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application fee for General/OBC category candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for General/OBC category candidates is Rs. 500/-.

faq.question: Q5. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The mode of application for this recruitment is Offline.

faq.question: Q6. What are the educational qualifications required for the posts?
faq.answer: The educational qualifications include SSC/10th or equivalent, and for some posts, ITI in Plumbing/Fitter/Mechanic trade is also required.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary range for the Paramedical and Supporting Staff posts?
faq.answer: The salary ranges from Rs. 15000/- to Rs. 18500/- per month, depending on the post.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for these positions?
faq.answer: The selection process involves aggregate marks in the qualifying examination, service weightage, and counseling on a merit basis.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Yes, there is age relaxation for SC/ST/BC/EWS (5 years), Ex-servicemen (3 years + service), and PWD (10 years).

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of DCHS Tirupati, and links are provided in the Important Links section.
